title: podman not able pull image
body:
### Issue Description

I'm trying to install podman (4.3.1) in my VDAAS machine windows i have created podman machine and i can able to start also but when I'm trying to podman pull image i'm getting error like connection refused.

```
Name                         URI                                                          Identity                                      Default
podman-machine-default       ssh://user@localhost:60710/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock  C:\Users\.ssh\podman-machine-default  false
podman-machine-default-root  ssh://root@localhost:60710/run/podman/podman.sock            C:\Users\.ssh\podman-machine-default  true
``` 

```
podman machine ssh
Connecting to vm podman-machine-default. To close connection, use `~.` or `exit`
ssh: connect to host localhost port 60710: Connection refused
```

```
wsl -l -v
  NAME                      STATE           VERSION
* podman-machine-default    Running         2
```

```
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 60710-State Listen

Get-NetTCPConnection : No matching MSFT_NetTCPConnection objects found by CIM query for instances of the
ROOT/StandardCimv2/MSFT_NetTCPConnection class on the  CIM server: SELECT * FROM MSFT_NetTCPConnection  WHERE ((LocalPort = 60710)) AND ((State
= 2)). Verify query parameters and retry.
At line:1 char:1
+ Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 60710-State Listen
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : ObjectNotFound: (MSFT_NetTCPConnection:String) [Get-NetTCPConnection], CimJobException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : CmdletizationQuery_NotFound,Get-NetTCPConnection
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.
2.
3.


### Describe the results you received

odman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
wsl: Error: 0xe000020b
Error code: CreateInstance/CreateVm/ConfigureNetworking/HNS/0xe000020b
wsl: Failed to configure network (networkingMode Nat), falling back to no networking.
API forwarding for Docker API clients is not available due to the following startup failures.
        CreateFile \\.\pipe\docker_engine: All pipe instances are busy.
 
Podman clients are still able to connect.
Machine "podman-machine-default" started successfully

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
```
wsl: Error: 0xe000020b
Error code: CreateInstance/CreateVm/ConfigureNetworking/HNS/0xe000020b
wsl: Failed to configure network (networkingMode Nat), falling back to no networking.
```

This sounds like some WSL errors and not something podman is doing, in any case upstream only supported the latest version and podman 4.3 is way to old.
